title: DamageTint For 1.21.11
description: Adds a red tint when the player takes damage!
body:
# Damage Tint for minecraft 1.21.11

**This project based on [Damage Tint by DeadlyMC](https://modrinth.com/mod/damage-tint) and was updated for Minecraft 1.21.11**

Requires fabric loader >=0.18.2

Adds a red tint when the player takes damage.
